title: Academy trust financial management: good practice guides
body: " The Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA) closed on 31 March 2025. All activity has moved to the Department for Education (DfE). You should continue to follow this guidance.   These guides provide suggestions about good practice for academy trusts. They do not replace or modify any requirements set out in the:    Academy Trust Handbook (ATH)  Academies Accounts Direction (AAD)  "

taxons.title: School and academy financial management and assurance
